contacto.description: Real people on the other side, 24/7. Reach us through the form or directly via the channel that fits best.
contacto.serviceStatusNote: Check incidents and maintenance in real time.

estado.demoData: Demo data · pending connection to real monitoring.

red.metaDescription: Autonomous system {asn} with {peers}+ peers and {capacity} Tbps of capacity. Direct peering at Europe's leading IXPs.
red.description: We operate our own autonomous system with direct peering at key European exchange points. Shorter routes, lower latency and total predictability.
red.coverageDescription: Each point is a region with local compute and mitigation. The lines represent the interconnection of our backbone.

noOverselling.d: The bandwidth you order is real capacity, not a shared theoretical maximum.

optimizedRoutes.d: Direct peering instead of transit whenever a route exists. Fewer hops, lower latency.

edgeMitigation.d: Attack traffic is filtered before it enters the network, not on your server.

casosDeUso.metaDescription: Web applications, databases, enterprise workloads and SaaS platforms on ViaHost infrastructure: same network, same protection, different scale.
casosDeUso.description: No matter what you deploy: underneath there is always NVMe Gen4, 10 Gbps networking and DDoS mitigation. Pick where to start.

items.title: Web applications
bullets: Deploy in 60 s on NVMe Gen4

proteccionDdos.metaDescription: Always-on DDoS mitigation of up to {mitigation} Tbps included in all plans. L3/L4 and L7 filtering at the network edge, with no cost per attack.
proteccionDdos.titlePrefix: The attack hits. To your server,
proteccionDdos.description: Always-on mitigation of up to {mitigation} Tbps, included with every VPS and every dedicated server. No cost per attack, no reconfiguration on your end.

steps.d: Traffic is analyzed as it enters the network. Attack signatures are identified in under 2 seconds.
L3/L4 and L7 rules that adjust to the attack signature, with no reroute or downtime windows.
Only legitimate traffic reaches your server. You do nothing; we charge nothing extra.

proteccionDdos.ctaSubtitle: DDoS included · no cost per attack · nothing to configure

desplegar.metaDescription: Choose your VPS or dedicated server plan and deploy it in 60 seconds.
desplegar.description: Select a plan to go to checkout. Same network, same NVMe Gen4 and the same DDoS protection on all of them.

sobreNosotros.metaDescription: {brand} is a European hosting provider with its own network ({asn}), focused on instant provisioning, hardware with no overselling and DDoS mitigation included.
sobreNosotros.description: {brand} was born to make deploying a server as fast as it should be: seconds, not days. Our own network, real hardware and a single promise kept every time.

principles.d: What you order physically exists and is reserved for you. No theoretical maximums, no noisy neighbors.
From provisioning to mitigation, the system acts on its own. Human support is reserved for what matters.
We operate our autonomous system {asn} and direct peering; we don't resell anyone else's network.
Monthly billing, no setup fees and no lock-in. DDoS protection is included, not an add-on.

sobreNosotros.ctaTitle: Join those already deploying with us
